concepts.lesson: A polygon is a two-dimensional shape with straight sides. It can be regular or irregular, depending on whether its sides are equal in length. Polygons have various properties, such as the number of sides, angles, and diagonals.
key_points: Regular polygons have equal side lengths
Irregular polygons do not have equal side lengths

concepts.lesson: Triangles are classified into different types based on their angles and sides. Equilateral triangles have all sides equal, isosceles triangles have two sides equal, and scalene triangles have no sides equal.
key_points: Equilateral triangle has all sides equal
Isosceles triangle has two sides equal
Scalene triangle has no sides equal

concepts.lesson: Quadrilaterals are four-sided shapes. They can be regular or irregular, depending on whether their sides are equal in length. Regular quadrilaterals have opposite sides that are parallel and equal in length.
key_points: Regular quadrilaterals have opposite sides that are parallel
Irregular quadrilaterals do not have opposite sides that are parallel
Quadrilaterals can be regular or irregular

concepts.lesson: Circles are two-dimensional shapes with no beginning or end. They have various properties, such as the center, radius, diameter, and circumference.
key_points: Circle has no beginning or end
Center of a circle is the point equidistant from all points on the circle
Diameter is twice the length of the radius

concepts.lesson: Solids are three-dimensional shapes with length, width, and height. They have various properties, such as volume, surface area, and edges.
key_points: Solids have length, width, and height
Volume of a solid is the amount of space inside it
Surface area of a solid is the total area of its faces
